response.justification: Bogdan has over 10 years of full-stack experience with strong alignment to the required stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, Docker), direct exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and internal tooling, and a proven track record of building scalable systems — including cloud-native deployments and testing frameworks — despite limited formal Nest.js or Vitest exposure, which can be learned on the job.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Proven work with AI-agent systems and internal developer tooling
Strong DevOps and infrastructure skills (Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD)
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in resume
Limited evidence of recent collaboration with product/design teams
German language proficiency is basic, may hinder local team integration
